_description: Pima Indians Diabetes Dataset. All numeric values. Feature names are case-sensitive.

_field_notes.Pregnancies: Number of times pregnant (integer, 0 if male or unknown)
_field_notes.Glucose: Plasma glucose concentration mg/dL (2-hour oral glucose tolerance test)
_field_notes.SkinThickness: Triceps skin fold thickness in mm
_field_notes.Insulin: 2-Hour serum insulin mu U/ml (0 if not measured)
_field_notes.BMI: Body Mass Index (weight kg / height m^2)
_field_notes.DiabetesPedigreeFunction: Diabetes pedigree function score (family history likelihood, e.g. 0.351)
